description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
*********************************************************************
Check out our other social media and product links:
https://linktr.ee/shedflips
*********************************************************************

It's Monday morning and we've got a pile of orders to ship — none of them too fragile, but plenty of fun ones. We pack 25/35mm vintage movie trailer reels (3 of the 10 we listed Thursday have already sold), triple-white New Balance sneakers, a Smashbox cosmetics order, a vintage G.I. Joe figure ($48 sale), car mats with a freehand box resize that triggered Candace's running "laughing at my package" joke, a $35 Mercari mask, a $200 set of D.H. Holmes department-store coffee mugs heading home to New Orleans, a Vic & Nat'ly serving tree (with a Times-Picayune coin-trivia detour), Lucasy boot form covers, a Pop Mart Happy Co art figure, KEEN shoes, mid-century Blenko art glass, a Stanley nesting two-cup stainless cookset shipping to NORWAY, a rough 1961 shop manual + supplement, a $200 paintball gun bundle headed to Texas, a vintage belt buckle, four boxed action figures, and a Dick Stoner magic book in a vinyl mailer. Plus the USPS Sunday rate-hike rant, the go-kart police chase story Ryan sent us, and Molly's upcoming Norway/Iceland/London cruise. Come pack with us!

Chapters:
0:00 Intro — Monday morning, nothing too fragile today
0:26 Pack 1 — 25/35mm vintage movie trailer reels (3 of 10 sold)
2:05 Pack 2 — New Balance triple-white NBs
3:43 Pack 3 — Ribbon lot + armchair pin cushion (filler-bag economics)
5:14 Friday yard sale recap — beer tap handle haul + sci-fi books
9:50 Pack 4 — Smashbox cosmetics
11:07 Pack 5 — Vintage G.I. Joe figure ($48)
13:33 Pack 6 — Car mats freehand resize (14x14x10)
16:50 "Candace started laughing at my package" — the title moment
17:14 Pack 7 — $35 Mercari mask (UPS)
18:47 Pack 8 — D.H. Holmes coffee mugs ($200) heading to New Orleans
19:50 Pack 9 — Vic & Nat'ly serving tree + Times-Picayune coin trivia
25:42 Pack 10 — Lucasy boot form covers (bubble mailer)
27:06 Pack 11 — Pop Mart Happy Co art figure
27:45 Pack 12 — KEEN shoes
29:24 USPS Sunday rate-hike rant (8% bump)
31:40 Pack 13 — Blenko mid-century art glass + Drew Carey tangent
40:39 Pack 14 — Stanley nesting two-cup stainless cookset to NORWAY
41:45 Molly's upcoming Norway/Iceland/London cruise
45:24 Pack 15 — 1961 shop manual + supplement
49:35 Pack 16 — $200 paintball gun bundle to Texas
53:21 Go-kart police chase story (5-mile chase, wrench-throw)
1:02:13 Pack 17 — Belt buckle (bubble mailer)
1:03:36 Pack 18 — Movie reel lot #2 (pre-packed slide-in)
1:04:44 Pack 19 — 4 boxed action figures (14x10x6)
1:07:08 Pack 20 — Dick Stoner magic book (vinyl mailer)
1:08:40 Pack 21 — Last item (8x6x4)
1:10:09 Wrap up

Thanks so much for packing along with us. We'll see y'all again very soon!

#packwithus #ebayreseller #imgonnapackit #shedflips #vintagepacking
